RMD_BIBLE_SAYS_INTRO: What truths can you find from the following Bible passages:
RMD_BIBLE_SAYS_LEADERSHIP_TITLE: GOD DESIGNED YOU TO BE A LEADER
RMD_BIBLE_SAYS_SUMMARY: The three Bible passages mentioned above show that God speaks to you about who you are and the purpose for which you were created.
RMD_CH1_COMPLETE_PROFILE_NOTE: Complete your personal profile in the school activities section (favorite subject).
RMD_CH1_HIGHEST_SCORE_SUBJECT: The highest score in my report card is subject
RMD_CH1_LEAST_FAV_SUBJECT: My least favorite school subject is
RMD_CH1_LOWEST_SCORE_SUBJECT: The lowest score in my report card is subject
RMD_CH4_CONSIDER_ACADEMIC: Does my academic achievement support it?
RMD_CH4_CONSIDER_GODS_WILL: Am I sure that this is what God wills for me?
RMD_CH4_CONSIDER_INTELLIGENCE: Does this profession match my intelligence?
RMD_CH4_CONSIDER_LEARNING_STYLE: Does this profession match my learning style?
RMD_CH4_DECISION_MATRIX_DESC: It's time for you to determine what profession you aspire to in the future. Use the table below to consider your alternatives.
RMD_CH4_DETERMINE_GOAL_DESC: Determining goals requires a special ability called decision making. Here are some things you can consider:
RMD_CH4_FINAL_REFLECTION: After this meeting is over, take some quiet time at home to reflect and write down the things you consider for each profession choice you might pursue in the future.
RMD_CH4_LEARNING_STYLE_DESC: Learning style is a person's way of receiving, processing, and remembering information. There are three types of learning styles: Visual, Auditory, and Kinesthetic. Each learning style has its own advantages and disadvantages. Knowing our learning style will help us in learning and determining suitable professions.
RMD_CH4_MULTIPLE_INTELLIGENCE_DESC: Multiple intelligences is a theory that states that everyone has various types of intelligence. There are 8 types of multiple intelligences: Linguistic, Logical-Mathematical, Visual-Spatial, Kinesthetic, Musical, Interpersonal, Intrapersonal, and Naturalist.
RMD_CH4_MULTIPLE_INTELLIGENCE_TITLE: Profession Choices Based on Multiple Intelligences
RMD_CH4_NOTE_MARK_THREE: From the list above, mark the 3 professions that interest you the most.
RMD_CH4_OPENING_TEXT_1: Many people say that the future is a mystery. No one knows what will happen in the future. However, we can plan our future. One way to plan the future is by determining goals.
RMD_CH4_OPENING_TEXT_2: Goals are dreams that we want to achieve in the future. Goals can be professions, jobs, or other things we want to do. In this meeting, we will learn how to determine goals that suit the potential and talents we have.
RMD_CH4_P2_CHECK1: I have explored career options based on my learning style and multiple intelligences.
RMD_CH4_P2_CHECK2: I have performed a SWOT analysis for my final career choice.
RMD_CH4_P2_CHECK3: I am confident in my final career decision.
RMD_CH4_P2_CHECKLIST_DESC: Check off the things you have completed in this chapter.
RMD_CH4_P2_FINAL_CAREER_LABEL: Based on your career decision matrix, what is your final career choice?
RMD_CH4_P2_FINAL_CAREER_PLACEHOLDER: Write your final career choice here...
RMD_CH4_P2_FINAL_CAREER_REASON_LABEL: Why did you choose this career?
RMD_CH4_P2_FINAL_CAREER_REASON_PLACEHOLD: Explain the reasons behind your career choice...
RMD_CH4_P2_MEETING: Meeting 2 - SWOT Analysis & Final Career Decision
RMD_CH4_P2_OPENING_TEXT: Now that you have explored various career options based on your learning style, multiple intelligences, and academic achievements, it is time to make your final decision. Use SWOT analysis to evaluate your top career choice.
RMD_CH4_P2_SWOT_DEF_LABEL: What is SWOT Analysis? (Write the definition in your own words)
RMD_CH4_P2_SWOT_DEF_PLACEHOLDER: Write the definition of SWOT analysis here...
RMD_CH4_PARENT_ADVICE: Ask for your parents' opinion when making a decision. Don't forget to write down your parents' opinion in the table above.
RMD_CH4_PLACEHOLDER_DISCUSS: Discuss with your group friends and write here...
RMD_CH4_PLACEHOLDER_FACTORS: Example: Expensive school fees (-), Matches learning style (+), Parents support (+)...
RMD_CH4_PROFESSION_TITLE: Profession Choices Based on Learning Style
RMD_CH4_TIPS_TEXT: The (-) or (+) signs indicate that the consideration supports or hinders that alternative choice.
RMD_CHAPTERS_DESCRIPTION: This page will contain the list of RMD chapters or sections that can be filled.
RMD_CHAPTER_REVIEW_DESC: We have discussed a lot about life purpose. Now try to write down what you got after studying this chapter. You can also describe what you got below.
RMD_CHAPTER_REVIEW_IMAGE_LABEL: Draw or upload an image representing your lesson:
RMD_CHAPTER_REVIEW_TITLE: Let's recall what we have learned in this chapter.
RMD_CLOSING_CHECKLIST_1: Knowing your development in the four development aspects.
RMD_CLOSING_CHECKLIST_3: Maximizing learning ways that suit your learning style.
RMD_CLOSING_CHECKLIST_4: Knowing your three main multiple intelligences.
RMD_CLOSING_DESC: Recall what we have discussed together today regarding your development in the intellectual aspect, then write down your conclusions and plans in the following table.
RMD_CLOSING_DESC_1: Remember that if you want to know what you are in the world for, you need to look for it in God, because He is the one who created you. God has a plan for your future full of hope. He will not plan something to hurt you.
RMD_CLOSING_DESC_2: Choose a song that describes God's goodness, sing it together with your mentor and friends. Then pray together surrendering your life to God who plans your future.
RMD_CLOSING_DESC_3: Congratulations because you have understood the importance of life purpose and know what the Bible says about life purpose.
RMD_CLOSING_PRAYER: Let us pray to give thanks to God for the intellectual ability that God has granted to each of us.
RMD_CLOSING_SECTION_CONGRATS: Congratulations because you have understood the importance of life purpose and know what the Bible says about life purpose.
RMD_CLOSING_SECTION_TEXT_1: Remember that if you want to know why you exist in the world, you need to look for it in God, because He is the one who created you. God has a plan for your future full of hope. He will not plan something to hurt you.
RMD_CLOSING_SECTION_TEXT_2: Choose a song that describes God's goodness, sing it together with your mentor and friends. Then pray together surrendering your life to God who planned your future.
RMD_CLOSING_TEXT_1: Recall what we have discussed today regarding your development in the intellectual aspect, then write your conclusions and plans in the following table.
RMD_CLOSING_TEXT_2: Congratulations! You have completed all intelligence assessments. Discuss your top three intelligences with your mentor and think about how you can develop them further.
RMD_COMPLETION_SUBTITLE: You have answered all sections. You can now proceed to Meeting 3.
RMD_CONFIRM_DELETE_FILE: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
RMD_DELETE_CONFIRMATION: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
RMD_DELETE_FILE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
RMD_DREAM_ISLAND_CONGRATS: Congratulations! You have completed all chapters of the Reaching My Dreams program. Keep working towards your Dream Island!
RMD_DREAM_ISLAND_IMPROVEMENT_DESC: Based on your SWOT analysis, write a plan to improve your weaknesses and maximize your strengths.
RMD_DREAM_ISLAND_OPENING_TEXT: You are about to complete your Reaching My Dreams journey. The Dream Island represents your future goals — the place you want to reach in life. This final section will help you solidify your plans and prepare for the journey ahead.
RMD_DREAM_ISLAND_SUBTITLE: Your Journey Map to the Future
RMD_DREAM_ISLAND_SWOT_DESC: Use what you have learned about yourself to complete this SWOT analysis for your future career.
RMD_EPHESIANS_GOD_WANTS: What does God want from us?
RMD_EPHESIANS_MADE_BY: According to this verse, whose workmanship are you?
RMD_EPHESIANS_PURPOSE: For what purpose were you created?
RMD_EXISTENTIAL_1: I often think about the meaning of life.
RMD_EXISTENTIAL_10: I often reflect on the role of humans in the history of the universe.
RMD_EXISTENTIAL_2: I am interested in philosophical questions.
RMD_EXISTENTIAL_3: I like studying various religions and belief systems.
RMD_EXISTENTIAL_4: I often ask 'why are we here?'.
RMD_EXISTENTIAL_5: I feel connected to the greater universe.
RMD_EXISTENTIAL_6: I am interested in the concept of eternity.
RMD_EXISTENTIAL_7: I like discussing ethics and morality.
RMD_EXISTENTIAL_8: I often feel amazed by the miracle of creation.
RMD_EXISTENTIAL_9: I seek a higher purpose in everything.
RMD_FAVORITE_SUBJECT_LABEL: The school subject I like the most is
RMD_FAVORITE_VERSE_LABEL: Among the verses above, which one is your favorite?
RMD_FAVORITE_VERSE_REASON_LABEL: Why is that verse so meaningful to you?
RMD_GENESIS_IMAGE: In whose image and likeness was man created?
RMD_GENESIS_PURPOSE: For what purpose did God make man?
RMD_GODS_PURPOSE_QUOTE: "In this section, we will together see how good and beautiful God's plan or intent was when He created you."
RMD_GODS_PURPOSE_TEXT_1: Have you ever seen a pencil used to tie hair or used to throw? Maybe some of you have seen it, but can the pencil function optimally if not for the purpose of writing? Likewise with human life, every human has a specific purpose for what he lives in the world.
RMD_GODS_PURPOSE_TEXT_2: If you want to know why you were placed in this world, you must start with God as your creator. You were born because of His plan and with a specific purpose. Focusing on yourself will never make us recognize the meaning and purpose of our lives.
RMD_GODS_PURPOSE_TEXT_3: You must start with God who is your creator. You were created by God and for God. At the time God created you, he had a big plan even through you God wants to show His work and greatness to this world.
RMD_GODS_PURPOSE_TEXT_4: Maybe you feel what you have been through is not a good experience, but actually God has a good plan for you even when you have experienced many bad experiences.
RMD_GROUP_ACTIVITY_1: Together with friends who have the same learning style as you, read and study the characteristics of your main learning style which are written in detail in the test sheet you just did.
RMD_GROUP_ACTIVITY_2: Discuss the suitability of these characteristics with your situation.
RMD_GROUP_ACTIVITY_ITEM_1: Together with friends who have the same learning style as you, read and study the characteristics of your main learning style which are detailed in the test sheet you just worked on.
RMD_GROUP_ACTIVITY_ITEM_2: Discuss the suitability of these characteristics with your situation.
RMD_GROUP_PROJECT_ITEM_2: Collect some additional information about your learning style to be shared with your mentor and friends at the next meeting.
RMD_GROUP_PROJECT_TASK_2: Together with your group, prepare a short presentation about one person you consider successful. Explain what things he has done or has so that people call him a successful person.
RMD_GROUP_PROJECT_TASK_2_DESC: Together with your group, prepare a short presentation about one person you consider successful. Explain what things he has done or has so that people call him a successful person.
RMD_IMPORTANCE_TEXT_1: Life purpose is very important, just like when you walk on the highway and meet a friend who is walking and you ask, "Where are you going?" Then your friend answers, "I'm just walking and don't know where to go." Isn't that very strange. People who walk every day without a purpose are people who will waste their lives.
RMD_IMPORTANCE_TEXT_2: When you know the destination of your trip, then usually you will prepare the important things that you will bring to reach that destination. When going on vacation to the forest or mountains, of course you don't need to bring swimwear or diving equipment. Likewise in preparing for your future, of course God has provided a good and beautiful goal for your future, but you need to make preparations to walk towards that future.
RMD_IMPORTANT_NOTICE_DESC_1: The belief you choose must be based on correct and adequate understanding, so that your belief is firm and you can live it wholeheartedly. If you are not too sure right now, it's okay. This is precisely the right time to start learning and understanding more about your belief in God and Christianity, so that you can truly experience a life full of victory with God.
RMD_IMPORTANT_NOTICE_DESC_2: Read back your answers, then answer the following questions to conclude.
RMD_INSTRUCTION_1: Prepare a pencil and eraser to fill in (here just click/tap).
RMD_INSTRUCTION_2: Check the statement number below that best describes you!
RMD_INSTRUCTION_3: Sum up all the check marks for each intelligence. That is the total score for each intelligence.
RMD_INSTRUCTION_LIST_1: 1 = Not true at all for me
RMD_INSTRUCTION_TEXT_1: Answer each statement below based on how true it is for you, using a scale of 1 to 5:
RMD_INTELLECTUAL_PROGRESS_TITLE: My progress in the intellectual aspect (based on the last 1 year report card)
RMD_INTERPERSONAL_1: I enjoy working with others in a group.
RMD_INTERPERSONAL_10: I prefer solving problems by talking to others.
RMD_INTERPERSONAL_2: I am very proud to be an advisor to others.
RMD_INTERPERSONAL_3: Others often come to my place to ask for advice.
RMD_INTERPERSONAL_4: I prefer team sports like soccer, basketball, rather than individual sports.
RMD_INTERPERSONAL_5: I like games involving other people like monopoly, checkers, cards.
RMD_INTERPERSONAL_7: I like a few very close best friends.
RMD_INTERPERSONAL_8: I can communicate well and can resolve disputes.
RMD_INTERPERSONAL_9: I do not hesitate to take leadership and show how to do something.
RMD_INTRAPERSONAL_1: I have hobbies or interests that I enjoy alone.
RMD_INTRAPERSONAL_10: I like spending time alone to think.
RMD_INTRAPERSONAL_2: I know what I am good at and what I am not.
RMD_INTRAPERSONAL_3: I often reflect on my feelings.
RMD_INTRAPERSONAL_4: I have a clear life purpose.
RMD_INTRAPERSONAL_5: I prefer working alone rather than in a team.
RMD_INTRAPERSONAL_7: I often write a diary or journal.
RMD_INTRAPERSONAL_8: I know how to motivate myself.
RMD_JEREMIAH_PLANS: What kind of plans does God have for your life?
RMD_JEREMIAH_WHO_KNOWS: Who knows the plans for your life?
RMD_KINESTETIC_10: I prefer learning new things while practicing them directly rather than just reading or watching.
RMD_KINESTETIC_2: I can imitate other people's movements, habits, or behaviors well.
RMD_KINESTETIC_3: I like thinking about problems while doing physical activities, for example: walking, running.

RMD_KINESTETIC_5: I enjoy challenging games related to physical activities.

RMD_KINESTETIC_9: I participate in physical activities such as swimming, cycling, hiking, outbound.

RMD_KINESTHETIC_TITLE: C. KINESTHETIC (LEARNING BY MOVING, WORKING AND TOUCHING)
RMD_LEADERSHIP_C1_DESC: A Christian leader is a leader who is centered on Christ as the source of his life. He grows in his knowledge of Christ who created him and has a beautiful plan for his life.
RMD_LEADERSHIP_C2_DESC: A Christian leader is a leader who lives in a spiritual community and is committed to being open and encouraging each other to continue to grow holistically. Leaders are never formed in isolation. He needs relationships with fellow human beings to grow and serve.
RMD_LEADERSHIP_C3_DESC: A Christian leader is a leader who constantly renews himself and grows in the likeness of his character to Christ. Christ's character is the quality that shows who a leader truly is. This quality allows a leader to continue to be trusted and effectively spread his influence without hindrance.
RMD_LEADERSHIP_C4_DESC: A Christian leader is a leader who knows why he exists in this world. This is called life purpose. He will also faithfully carry out his life purpose and obediently do it to fulfill what God has planned for his life from the beginning.
RMD_LEADERSHIP_C5_DESC: A Christian leader is a leader who continuously develops himself with various abilities needed to be able to complete his life's calling. A Christian leader will always learn and develop himself, so that he is ready to do what God wants in his life.
RMD_LEADERSHIP_CLOSING_INTRO: To become a complete leader takes a long time, loyalty, and lifelong commitment. But remember that being a leader is the goal that God set when humans were created in this world. Through whatever your job later in the future, God can use you to be His extension in managing the earth and everything in it so that everything goes according to His will and brings glory to His name.
RMD_LEADERSHIP_CONCLUSION: To become a complete leader takes a long time, loyalty, and lifelong commitment. But remember that becoming a leader is the purpose God set when man was created in this world. Through whatever your work in the future, God can use you to be His extension in managing the earth and everything in it so that everything runs according to His will and brings glory to His name.
RMD_LEADERSHIP_INTRO_1: Did you know that in the beginning God created humans to be leaders who rule over the earth and everything in it, for God's glory?
RMD_LEADERSHIP_INTRO_2: A servant of God named Malcom Webber suggested that a Christian leader (meaning a leader who is like Christ) has five important characteristics so that he can live a life used by God. These five characteristics are known as the 5Cs, which consist of:
RMD_LEADERSHIP_TITLE: GOD DESIGNED YOU TO BE A LEADER
RMD_LEARNING_STYLE_DESC_1: Learning style is the most preferred and effective way for someone to absorb, remember, and process information.
RMD_LEARNING_STYLE_DESC_2: Understanding learning styles will help us know the learning methods that are most suitable for us so that we can learn effectively.
RMD_LEARNING_STYLE_DESC_3: Bobbi DePorter and Mike Hernacki in their book "Quantum Learning" state that everyone's learning style is divided into 3 types, namely visual, auditory, and kinesthetic learning styles.
RMD_LINGUISTIC_1: I memorize names, places, dates, or other small details very well.
RMD_LINGUISTIC_10: I can easily absorb information just by listening to the radio, cassettes, or the teacher's words. I easily remember words.
RMD_LINGUISTIC_2: I read anything: books, magazines, comics, newspapers, etc.
RMD_LINGUISTIC_3: I am good at storytelling, communicating, and writing about things.
RMD_LINGUISTIC_4: I often retell things I have read or heard.
RMD_LINGUISTIC_5: I like doing crosswords, playing puzzles, word games/rhymes, scrabble.
RMD_LINGUISTIC_6: I have a good vocabulary so sometimes other children ask me to explain meanings.
RMD_LINGUISTIC_7: At school I prefer English, History, and Social Studies.
RMD_LINGUISTIC_8: I can handle oral debates and explain things in a directed and clear manner.
RMD_LINGUISTIC_9: I often think about what I should say in solving problems, and ask questions.
RMD_LOGICAL_1: I enjoy working with numbers and can calculate mentally.
RMD_LOGICAL_10: I easily understand cause and effect.
RMD_LOGICAL_2: I am interested in technology and like doing experiments to see how things work.
RMD_LOGICAL_4: I often make written lists of what I will do.
RMD_LOGICAL_5: I enjoy puzzles, chess, bricks, checkers, or other strategy games.
RMD_LOGICAL_6: I tend to recognize logical errors in what people say or do.
RMD_LOGICAL_7: I like Mathematics and Physics subjects.
RMD_LOGICAL_8: I enjoy analyzing situations and arguing.
RMD_LOGICAL_9: In solving problems, I do it step by step.
RMD_LOGICAL_MATHEMATICAL_1: I enjoy working with numbers and can calculate mentally.
RMD_LOGICAL_MATHEMATICAL_10: I easily understand cause and effect.
RMD_LOGICAL_MATHEMATICAL_2: I am interested in technology and like doing experiments to see how things work.
RMD_LOGICAL_MATHEMATICAL_4: I often make written lists of what I will do.
RMD_LOGICAL_MATHEMATICAL_5: I enjoy puzzles, chess, bricks, checkers, or other strategy games.
RMD_LOGICAL_MATHEMATICAL_6: I tend to recognize logical errors in what people say or do.
RMD_LOGICAL_MATHEMATICAL_7: I like Mathematics and Physics subjects.
RMD_LOGICAL_MATHEMATICAL_8: I enjoy analyzing situations and arguing.
RMD_LOGICAL_MATHEMATICAL_9: In solving problems, I do it step by step.
RMD_MAXIMIZING_DESC_1: After you know your learning style, you can think of various appropriate ways to maximize your learning activities. Together with friends who have the same learning style, try to conduct a survey to list learning methods that suit your learning style and try to start applying them when you study.
RMD_MAXIMIZING_DESC_2: You can ask your mentor, read reference books in the PPA or school library, look for articles on the internet that explain learning methods that suit your main learning style. Take good note of the survey results you get and tell your friends in your group at the next meeting.
RMD_MAXIMIZING_DESC_3: Hopefully you can maximize your study hours with effective learning methods according to your learning style. After you practice it, try to feel, can you understand and remember what you study easier and faster? Share your experience with friends in your group.
RMD_MAXIMIZING_LEARNING_TEXT_1: After you know your learning style, you can think of various appropriate ways to maximize your learning activities. Together with friends who have the same learning style, try to conduct a survey to list learning methods that suit your learning style and try to start applying them when you learn.
RMD_MAXIMIZING_LEARNING_TEXT_2: You can ask mentors, read reference books in the PPA or school library, search for articles on the internet that explain learning methods that suit your main learning style. Note carefully the survey results you get and tell your friends in your group at the next meeting.
RMD_MAXIMIZING_LEARNING_TEXT_3: Hopefully you can maximize your study hours with effective learning methods according to your learning style. After you practice it, try to feel, can you understand and remember what you learned easier and faster? Share your experience with friends in your group.
RMD_MEETING_2_OPENING_LIST_1: Gather with your friends who have the same learning style.
RMD_MEETING_2_OPENING_LIST_2: Share your survey results with your friends.
RMD_MEETING_2_OPENING_LIST_3: Pay attention to your friends' presentations and complete your notes on learning methods that suit your learning style.
RMD_MEETING_2_OPENING_TEXT_1: Surely you still remember what was learned in the previous meeting. Have you managed to do the assignment from the last meeting?
RMD_MEETING_3_INTRO_TEXT_1: In the previous two meetings, we have learned together about intellectual aspects and learning styles. Have you practiced the learning methods that suit your learning style?
RMD_MEETING_3_INTRO_TEXT_2: Your first year in Junior High School (SLTP/SMP) is a transitional period. You will experience many changes, not only in the way you learn, but also in your physical, socio-emotional, and spiritual growth.
RMD_MEETING_3_INTRO_TEXT_3: Now we will see your development in these three aspects over the past year.
RMD_MEETING_3_REFLECTION_QUESTION_1: Have you practiced the learning methods that suit your learning style?
RMD_MULTIPLE_INTELLIGENCES_INSTRUCTION_1: Mark the numbers 1-5 below (1 = Not Suitable, 5 = Very Suitable)
RMD_MULTIPLE_INTELLIGENCES_INSTRUCTION_2: Make sure you fill in all questions.
RMD_MULTIPLE_INTELLIGENCES_INTRO: A person's intelligence is not only determined by their report card grades. There are many other types of intelligence not measured by school report cards. Let's try answering the questionnaire below to find out what intelligences you possess.
RMD_MUSICAL_10: I often use rhythm to remember something, for example remembering a phone number.
RMD_MUSICAL_2: I can sing according to the pitch of the key.
RMD_MUSICAL_3: I can usually remember a rhythm just by listening a few times.
RMD_MUSICAL_4: I often listen to music at home. I like doing things while listening to songs.
RMD_MUSICAL_5: I follow the rhythm of music well and unconsciously tap the table accompanying the rhythm of the song I hear.
RMD_MUSICAL_6: I have good grades for Art lessons at school.
RMD_MUSICAL_7: Commercial jingles often appear in my memory.
RMD_MUSICAL_8: I cannot imagine life without music.
RMD_MUSICAL_9: I often whistle or hum following the rhythm of a song.
RMD_MY_PERSONAL_PROGRESS_TITLE: My Personal Progress In Four Development Aspects
RMD_NATURALIST_10: I am good at distinguishing various types of flora and fauna.
RMD_NATURALIST_2: I like keeping plants or animals.
RMD_NATURALIST_3: I am good at recognizing types of trees, flowers, or birds.
RMD_NATURALIST_4: I care about the environment and nature conservation.
RMD_NATURALIST_6: I enjoy learning about stars, weather, or geology.
RMD_NATURALIST_7: I like collecting objects from nature like stones or shells.
RMD_NATURALIST_8: I feel calm when I am in nature.
RMD_NATURALIST_9: I like visiting zoos or national parks.
RMD_NAVIGATE_ERROR: Failed to load the next page. Please try again.
RMD_NAV_ERROR: Failed to navigate. Please try again.
RMD_OPENING_LIST_1: You will get to know your multiple intelligences.
RMD_OPENING_LIST_2: You will discover your top 3 intelligences.
RMD_OPENING_LIST_3: You will reflect on how to develop your intelligences.
RMD_OPENING_QUESTION: What are the unique traits that you have?
RMD_OPENING_TEXT_1: Share your story and uniqueness with your friends.
RMD_OPENING_TEXT_2: Have you ever watched a talent show, for example America's Got Talent (AGT)? In shows like AGT, participants display their best skills and abilities. Each participant has a unique characteristic that others do not possess. Every human being is indeed gifted by God with their own uniqueness. Some are hereditary (innate talent), some are obtained from practice, and some come from a combination of both (innate talent + practice).
RMD_OPENING_TEXT_3: Through this RMD book, you will be taken to deeper understand what uniqueness you have. Don't miss every meeting, so you don't miss the materials.
RMD_PERSONAL_PROGRESS_TEXT_1: The Child Development Center (PPA) where you are registered has designed various activities to develop teenagers like you through four development aspects. The four aspects are Intellectual, Socio-Emotional, Physical, and Spiritual. You will learn the Intellectual aspect in Meetings 1-2, while the other aspects in Meeting 3.
RMD_PERSONAL_PROGRESS_TEXT_2: The PPA activities you participate in will certainly help you grow into a better person over time. As a first step in discovering your uniqueness, try using the following questions to see your personal state. We start from the first aspect, which is intellectual.
RMD_PHYSICAL_ASPECT_DESC: Physical development is no less important than intellectual development. As you get older, you will definitely experience physical changes.
RMD_PHYSICAL_ASPECT_TITLE: My Development in Physical Aspect Over the Last Year
RMD_PHYSICAL_Q3: Other physical characteristics (hair type, skin color, etc.)
RMD_PHYSICAL_REFLECT_Q1: What do I like most about my physical condition?
RMD_PHYSICAL_REFLECT_Q2: What do I want to develop? How?
RMD_PRAYER: "Let us pray to give thanks to God for the intellectual ability that God has given to each of us."
RMD_PROFILE_AUTO_CALC: *Calculated automatically based on birth date + 21 years
RMD_PROFILE_DOB_LOCKED: Date of birth cannot be changed.
RMD_PROFILE_ERROR_MSG: An error occurred while saving data. Please check your input again.
RMD_PROFILE_SUBTITLE: Fill in this personal profile data completely and honestly.
RMD_PROFILE_SUCCESS_MSG: Your profile data has been successfully saved.
RMD_PROJECT_DESC: Collect some additional information about your learning style to convey to your mentor and friends at the next meeting.
RMD_PROJECT_ITEM_1: Together with your mentor, discuss and share your top 3 intelligences with the group.
RMD_PROJECT_ITEM_2: Think about one way you can use your top intelligence in your daily life this week.
RMD_RECALL_DESC: We have discussed a lot about life purpose. Now try to write down what you got after studying this chapter. You can also draw what you got below.
RMD_RECALL_IMAGE_LABEL: Draw or upload an image representing your learning:
RMD_REFLECTION_DEVELOPMENT_LABEL: How can you develop your dominant intelligence?
RMD_REFLECTION_IMPROVEMENT:
What do I want to develop?
How?
RMD_REFLECTION_INSTRUCTION: Read back your answers above. Then reflect and answer the following questions:
RMD_REFLECTION_INTRO: Based on the test results above, and after discussing with your friends, answer the following questions:
RMD_REFLECTION_LEARNING_LABEL: What new thing did you learn about yourself from this chapter?
RMD_REFLECTION_NEW_LEARNING_LABEL: What new thing did you learn about yourself today?
RMD_REFLECTION_PLAN_LABEL: What is your next plan to develop your potential?
RMD_REFLECTION_SUITABILITY_LABEL: Does the test result match what you feel about yourself? Explain.
RMD_RESULT_INSTRUCTION: Copy your 3 dominant intelligences (rank 1-3) to the conclusion table below.
RMD_SCORE_SUMMARY_INSTRUCTION: After completing all sections, fill in your scores in the table below to find out your top 3 intelligences!
RMD_SHARE_INSTRUCTION: Share both of these with your mentor and friends!
RMD_SOCIO_ASPECT_DESC: Socio-emotional aspect is the ability to understand and manage emotions, as well as build relationships with others.
RMD_SOCIO_ASPECT_INSTRUCTION: Fill in the following table regarding your socio-emotional development:
RMD_SOCIO_ASPECT_TITLE: My Development in Socio-Emotional Aspect Over the Last Year
RMD_SOCIO_Q1: Birth order and number of siblings
RMD_SOCIO_Q3: Chores I am responsible for at home
RMD_SOCIO_Q5: Extracurricular activities I participate in at school
RMD_SPIRITUAL_ASPECT_DESC: This is the last aspect we discuss, but precisely the most important and underlies all other aspects. All activities we do, whether physical activities, schooling, social activities, and others, we do as a form of our love and obedience to God. That means, the spiritual aspect becomes the center and should be the driver for all other aspects. Answer some questions in the table below.
RMD_SPIRITUAL_ASPECT_TITLE: My Development in Spiritual Aspect Over the Last Year
RMD_SPIRITUAL_Q1: To what extent do I know Jesus personally?
RMD_SPIRITUAL_Q2: How is the growth of my personal relationship with God?
RMD_SPIRITUAL_Q3: How far has my love for Him grown? How do I grow in obedience to Him?
RMD_SPIRITUAL_Q4: Do I have a community that helps me grow spiritually?
RMD_SPIRITUAL_Q5: Do I study the Bible regularly and enjoy it?
RMD_SPIRITUAL_Q6: Are there adults who help me grow spiritually? Explain how they help you grow!
RMD_TABLE_DEVELOPMENT_ASPECT: My Intellectual Aspect Development and Learning Style
RMD_THE_ONLY_ONE_NOTE_1: By the way, if your report card grades are not very satisfactory, don't be sad. You still have time to study harder to get better grades this year.
RMD_THE_ONLY_ONE_NOTE_2: To be more effective in learning, it is good for you to know the Learning Style Type you have.
RMD_THOMAS_CARLYLE_QUOTE: Thomas Carlyle, a historian from Scotland, once said, "A person who lives without a purpose is like a ship without a rudder."
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_BIBLE_INTRO: Read Luke 2:52, Philippians 2:5-10, Matthew 3:17 and discuss the following questions:
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_CLOSING_DESC: We have learned together the meaning of true success. Let's pray together so that we are helped to follow Jesus who succeeded in obeying until death and obtained true success with God.
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_DEFINITION_LABEL: A successful life according to me and my friends is:
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_DESC_1: In this chapter we will look together at the meaning of true success. Many of us want to be successful. There are various things that make someone said to be successful, like the various stories you heard at the beginning of this meeting.
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_DESC_2: Have you ever done a job and felt very satisfied and happy with the result of that job? Maybe you succeeded in completing a math exam and got the best grade, or in an art lesson you created a work that was admired by many people, or maybe when playing a game you managed to reach a certain level.
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_DESC_3: Success will always cause a sense of satisfaction and happiness, because we reach what we hope for. Likewise with our lives. Have you ever thought for a moment about what is the best thing you want to do or achieve in your life?
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_DESC_4: In your opinion, what is a successful life like? Try to discuss with your friends, share your opinion and listen to your friends' opinions too. List your findings below.
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_GOD_OPINION_QUESTION: What does God say about Jesus (Matthew 3:17, Philippians 2:9)
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_INTRO_TASK: Share a story about a person you consider successful in front of your mentor and friends, according to the assignment given in the previous meeting.
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_JESUS_SUCCESS_QUESTION: In your opinion, can what Jesus achieved in His life be said to be successful in the view of society in general? Explain!
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_LEARNED_1: Various kinds of success according to people's opinions in general
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_LEARNED_2: The meaning of true success according to the Bible
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_LUKE_QUESTION: What growth did Jesus experience according to Luke 2:52?
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_MEASURE_LABEL: What is the measure of life success according to people around you in general?
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_PHILIPPIANS_QUESTION: Based on Philippians 2:5-10, what did Jesus do in His life? (See verses 6-8).
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_PROJECT_TASK_2: Prepare a short presentation about yourself and the unique things you have to be delivered to your friends and mentor at the next meeting.
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_QUOTE: “True success is us fully obeying God to fulfill His purpose”
RMD_TRUE_SUCCESS_REFLECTION_LABEL: Now draw/write a new thing you got about success!
RMD_UPLOAD_INSTRUCTION: Upload supporting documents for this meeting (optional).
RMD_VISUAL_SPATIAL_1: I appreciate art, enjoy paintings and sculptures. I have high taste in colors.
RMD_VISUAL_SPATIAL_10: I like reading books accompanied by many pictures/comics.
RMD_VISUAL_SPATIAL_2: I like to imagine with clear images when thinking about something.
RMD_VISUAL_SPATIAL_3: I can draw well, exactly like the original.
RMD_VISUAL_SPATIAL_4: I can easily determine directions well, I can read maps.
RMD_VISUAL_SPATIAL_6: I can take something apart and put it back together well.
RMD_VISUAL_SPATIAL_7: I often doodle on a piece of paper or in a school notebook.
RMD_VISUAL_SPATIAL_8: I often explain what is in my mind with pictures, and I can read diagrams.
RMD_WELCOME_TEXT_1: Hi, future holders! In the next ten years, what will you be able to do? Where will you work? Who will you meet? Or which cities have you visited? If you get this book at the age of 12, then in the next ten years you will be 22 years old. By then, how much have you grown according to God's plan and design in your life?
RMD_WELCOME_TEXT_2: This book will help you have a plan to achieve all your dreams in the future. However, this book will be more effective and useful if you have a mentor who helps you in the process, because realizing your future dreams is certainly not easy. A mentor will help you make plans and carry out all your plans.
RMD_WELCOME_TEXT_3: The journey to the future has just begun, and this journey will be valuable when you involve the Lord Jesus in it. Thus you can achieve the fullness of God's plan in your life. Good luck fighting until the future planned by God is achieved.
RMD_WHAT_IS_LIST_1: You might dream of becoming an influential politician.
RMD_WHAT_IS_LIST_2: You might dream of helping people in the hospital.
RMD_WHAT_IS_LIST_3: You might dream of becoming the next Lionel Messi, the famous football player.
RMD_WHAT_IS_LIST_4: You might dream of becoming someone used by God to serve others.
RMD_WHAT_IS_QUOTE_TITLE: What dreams do you have in your heart for your future?
RMD_WHAT_IS_TEXT_1: As the name suggests, My Future Plan Book (RMD) is a book (in digital form) that can be a tool to plan your future. Through this book, you will be led to understand what purpose God has designed for your life. Your life is truly precious and therefore needs to be lived well as designed by God. Through this book, you can build dreams for your future and prepare yourself to realize those dreams.
RMD_WHAT_IS_TEXT_2: This is your opportunity to make the life God has granted truly meaningful, beneficial to others and glorifying God's name. Get ready to find your best dreams in God, and give your best effort so that those dreams are not just mere fantasies, but can truly be realized into reality.
RMD_WHAT_IS_TEXT_3: This book consists of two major parts. The first part contains your personal profile and planning list. While the second part contains seven learning chapters that will guide you to make future plans every year. Follow every lesson in this book and complete your personal profile and planning year by year, so that your journey map to the dream island, which is your future goal, becomes more complete every year.
RMD_WHAT_IS_TEXT_4: Completing this RMD book certainly does not mean you will immediately reach your dream island. Of course, it takes your effort, discipline and loyalty to carry out the plans you have made. Remember to always be enthusiastic throughout the journey to your dream island. Use your planning as your journey map, so you don't get lost and arrive at your destination soon.
RMD_WHAT_IS_TEXT_5: This book is designed to be studied and filled in slowly in small groups with the assistance of a mentor. There will be lots of discussions, sharing opinions, joint projects and other learning activities that you will participate in together with your friends. We hope you can build friendships with fellow friends throughout your journey of building dreams and realizing them.
RMD_WHAT_IS_TEXT_6: Hopefully you and all your friends at PPA can discover and maximize the potential that God has given and rise to become teenagers who are committed to carrying out the noble task that God has entrusted. Happy planning your future together with God.
RMD_WHAT_IS_TITLE: WHAT IS MY FUTURE PLAN BOOK
